name: Vishnu Priyaan
headline: Designing Enterprise Systems for Tomorrow
bio: For more than 15 years, I've designed and delivered enterprise technology platforms that power global organizations across banking, financial services, manufacturing, retail, and Global Capability Centers (GCCs). My work bridges infrastructure, cloud, IT operations, IT service management, and IT asset management—transforming complex technology landscapes into scalable, secure, and intelligent ecosystems.

As an Infrastructure & Enterprise Solution Architect, I specialize in designing end-to-end enterprise architectures that integrate business strategy with modern technology platforms. My expertise spans ServiceNow, Flexera, cloud infrastructure, observability, automation, and enterprise integrations, enabling organizations to modernize operations while improving governance, operational resilience, and user experience.

Throughout my career, I've led architecture initiatives for global organizations including Commonwealth Bank of Australia, EY, Cognizant, Wipro, Trianz, and other enterprise customers, delivering technology solutions that scale across thousands of servers, applications, users, and business services.
expertise: ServiceNow Architecture (ITSM, ITOM, Discovery, CMDB, CSDM, Service Mapping, Event Management, IntegrationHub, Flow Designer)
IT Asset Management & Software Asset Management (Flexera One, FlexNet Manager Suite, Flexera Data Platform, SaaS Manager)
Endpoint & Discovery Technologies (Tanium, BigFix, IBM ILMT, Microsoft SCCM, Snow Software)
Cloud & Hybrid Infrastructure (AWS, Azure, VMware, Hybrid Cloud Architecture)
Observability & Operations (Observe (OpenTelemetry), SolarWinds, PagerDuty, Monitoring & Event Correlation)
Enterprise Integrations (REST APIs, Middleware, Identity Platforms, Automation Frameworks)
AI-powered Enterprise Automation and Digital Transformation
outcomes: CAD 1.4M+ in platform cost optimization and licensing efficiencies
45–50% improvement in incident detection and recovery through modern observability
~98% SLA compliance across enterprise-scale banking environments
Enterprise CMDB and CSDM transformations supporting governance and operational excellence
Large-scale ITAM and SAM modernization initiatives improving software compliance and asset visibility
Cloud and infrastructure modernization programs focused on resilience, automation, and scalability

principles.title: Model before you build
principles.detail: Every successful platform begins with a well-defined operating model and a trusted data foundation. Strong governance, accurate CMDBs, and CSDM alignment create systems that remain scalable long after implementation.

principles.title: Design the ecosystem, not the product
principles.detail: Technology platforms should never operate in isolation. ServiceNow, Flexera, cloud infrastructure, monitoring, endpoint management, and business services must function as one connected enterprise ecosystem.

principles.title: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication
principles.detail: The best architectures reduce operational complexity while increasing reliability. Every design decision should improve maintainability, scalability, and the experience of the teams who operate the platform every day.

principles.title: Build for resilience
principles.detail: Architecture proves its value during incidents, outages, audits, and rapid business change—not in presentation decks. Resilient systems prioritize observability, automation, governance, and operational excellence from day one.
